note: Offset-based neutrality (T3) + unbaselined reduction claim (T1) + Scope 3 omitted while 1/2 disclosed (T2) + net-zero 2050 with no interim milestone (T4) + bare superlatives (T5). Multiple major tells -> Not Recommended.
Full three-scope inventory, baselined reductions, milestoned targets (2027/2030/2050), no offset-neutrality claim, no bare superlatives. No tells fire.

Full Scope 3 inventory, milestoned targets, no offsets — but one unbaselined reduction claim ('significant reductions in our environmental footprint' with no baseline value or year). Exactly 1 major tell -> Improving.

Clean inventory, baselined claims, milestoned targets, no offsets — but bare superlatives ('among the greenest', 'world-class'). Exactly 1 minor tell -> Recommended (minors alone cap at Recommended for <=1).
Clean report according to strict T1-T5 rubric constraints.
